chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 67 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6280/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.6281/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on MA No.6282/2023 (561-A CrPC) 5. For hearing of main case 24.11.2023 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for applicant. No intimation is received. This application was filed on 16.10.2023, more than one month ago, and since then no one has pursued. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
